methods.description: Process of collecting sediment samples from the Ha Makotoko rockshelter for various analyses.

steps.description: Sediment samples (n = 21) were taken from a geoarchaeological column adjacent to the primary excavation trench during the 2009/2010 excavations.
steps.searchable_summary: collect sediment samples from geoarchaeological column

steps.description: Samples were selected to facilitate complementary micromorphological, particle size, phytolith, and stable carbon isotope analyses.

methods.description: Extraction and isolation of plant biomarkers from sediment samples using pressurized solvent extraction and chromatography.

steps.description: Dry, homogenized sediments (~10 g, n = 16) were extracted with a Büchi SpeedExtractor E-916 using 9:1 Dichloromethane:Methanol at 100 °C and 103 bar in three, 10-min cycles.
steps.searchable_summary: extract plant biomarkers using pressurized solvent extraction

steps.description: The TLE was concentrated to ~1 mL using a Büchi SyncorePlus evaporator and then evaporated to dryness using a steady stream of N2.
steps.searchable_summary: concentrate and dry total lipid extract

steps.description: The TLE was separated into Neutral, Acid, and Polar fractions by Aminopropyl column chromatography.
steps.searchable_summary: separate lipid extract into fractions using chromatography

steps.description: Normal (n-) alkanes were isolated from the Neutral fraction using silver nitrate infused silica gel column chromatography with 4 mL Hexane.
steps.searchable_summary: isolate n-alkanes using silica gel chromatography

methods.description: Analysis of n-alkanes using gas chromatography and mass spectrometry to determine molecular characteristics.

steps.description: The n-alkanes were analysed with an Agilent 7890B Gas Chromatograph System equipped with an Agilent HP-5 capillary column and coupled to a 5977A Series Mass Selective Detector.
steps.searchable_summary: analyze n-alkanes using gas chromatography and mass spectrometry

steps.description: Average chain length and carbon preference index were calculated using the abundances of odd and even chain lengths from C25 to C35.
steps.searchable_summary: calculate average chain length and carbon preference index

methods.description: Measurement of compound specific carbon and hydrogen isotope ratios of n-alkane homologues using gas chromatography and isotope ratio mass spectrometry.

steps.description: Compound specific carbon isotope ratios (δ13C) of n-alkane homologues C25-C35 were measured using an Agilent 7890A GC System coupled to a Thermo Fisher Scientific Delta V Plus Isotope Ratio Mass Spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure carbon isotope ratios using GC-IRMS

steps.description: Compound specific hydrogen isotope ratios (δD) of the C25-C35 n-alkanes were measured using an Agilent 7890B GC System coupled to an Elementar Isoprime AnthrovisION Mass Spectrometer.
steps.searchable_summary: measure hydrogen isotope ratios using GC-IRMS

steps.description: The accuracy of the δ13C and δD values were evaluated against an international standard laboratory mixture.
steps.searchable_summary: validate isotope ratio measurements against standards

methods.description: Statistical tests used to analyze molecular characterizations and isotope ratios.

steps.description: Spearman's rank test was used to correlate the molecular characterizations of ACL, CPI, and the δ13C and δD of the individual C29-C33 n-alkanes.
Mann-Whitney U-tests and Kruskal-Wallis tests were used to test the significance in differences between the C29-C33 δ13C and δD values.
steps.searchable_summary: perform Mann-Whitney U-test and Kruskal-Wallis test

methods.description: Creation of an age-depth model for Ha Makotoko using the Bchronology algorithm to interpolate age-depth relationships.

steps.description: We used the Bchronology algorithm from the R package 'Bchron' to create an age-depth model for Ha Makotoko.
steps.searchable_summary: create age-depth model using Bchronology algorithm

steps.description: The plot was produced in R with ggplot2 to include upper and lower uncertainty estimates based on the 5-95% quantile ranges for interpolated ages.
steps.searchable_summary: visualize age-depth model with uncertainty estimates
